nodes.name: Manual Trigger (dev)
nodes.notes: Manual trigger for local testing. Use the example payload node after this trigger.

nodes.name: Incident Webhook (prod)
nodes.notes: Production entry point for PagerDuty, Opsgenie, Grafana, custom alerting, or another alert source. Configure authentication before external use.

assignments.name: summary
assignments.value: Payments API latency > 5s for 30% of requests

nodes.name: Validate & Route Incident
nodes.notes: Validates the alert payload, normalises severity and marks low-severity incidents as ignored rather than escalating them.

nodes.name: Prepare Incident Control
nodes.notes: Adds owning team, on-call contact, retry policy and idempotency keys for all downstream orchestration actions.

nodes.notes: Demo-safe orchestration branch. Replace with real connector/API nodes while keeping structured action status and idempotency metadata.

nodes.name: Build Live Incident Object
nodes.notes: Aggregates action outputs into one live incident object with links, owners, status and failed-action visibility.

nodes.name: Prepare Operations Alerts
nodes.notes: Creates alert payloads for failed orchestration actions or degraded enrichment sources. Replace/extend with Slack, email, PagerDuty or Opsgenie.

nodes.name: Prepare Incident Channel Update
nodes.notes: Builds the message that would be posted into the incident channel or sent to stakeholders.

nodes.name: Prepare Post-Incident Review Prompt
nodes.notes: Optional post-incident documentation prompt. Keep this outside the live response critical path; use it after stabilisation or resolution.

parameters.jsCode:
const source = items[0]?.json ?? {};
const auditRecord = {
  audit_type: 'incident_response_orchestration_result',
  logged_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  incident_id: source.incident_id,
  service: source.service,
  severity: source.severity,
  orchestration_status: source.orchestration_status,
  live_incident: source.live_incident,
  enrichment_results: source.enrichment_results,
  action_results: source.action_results,
  operations_alerts: source.operations_alerts,
  idempotency_keys: source.control?.idempotency_keys,
  retry_policy: source.control?.retry_policy,
  incident_channel_update_markdown: source.incident_channel_update_markdown,
  post_incident_review: source.post_incident_review,
};

return [{ json: { ...source, audit_record: auditRecord, audit_status: 'ready_for_durable_store' } }];

nodes.name: Log Audit Snapshot (demo)
nodes.notes: Demo audit checkpoint. Replace or extend with an incidents database, object storage, Google Drive, Notion, Jira/Linear update, or data warehouse write.
